# General Consent accepted - CH Core (R4) v7.0.0-ballot

* **General Consent accepted**

## Example Consent: General Consent accepted

Profile: [CH Core General Consent](StructureDefinition-CHCoreGeneralConsent.md)

## Participants

* **Role**: Patient
  * **Details**: [Max Muster (official) Male, DoB: 1938-12-12 ( Medical record number)](Patient-MaxMuster.md)
* **Role**: Party
  * **Details**: [SpitalSeeblick](Organization-SpitalSeeblick.md)

This consent is made under the policy [https://www.unimedsuisse.ch/de/projekte/generalkonsent](https://www.unimedsuisse.ch/de/projekte/generalkonsent) .

* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): permit
  * [Time Period](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [What](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Rules](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-qi-hidden.png)deny
  * [Time Period](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): * Period: 2025-03-17 --> (ongoing)

  * [What](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): * Purpose: [v3 Code System ActReason: HRESCH](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/v3/ActReason/cs.html#v3-ActReason-HRESCH) (healthcare research)
* Code: General Consent

  * [Rules](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [Rule](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format
